content.title: Hellooooooo
paragraphs: I don't know if you realize how often that happens. How a random song, a colour, a quiet moment in the evening, will quietly remind me that you exist and that somehow makes everything feel a little warmer.
I know lavender is your colour, and honestly, I think that suits you perfectly  gentle, beautiful, and with a kind of quiet magic that stays with you long after you've stopped looking. 💜

I'm not writing this because I need an answer to anything. I'm writing this because you deserve to know on a completely ordinary day that someone out here thinks the world is a much better place just because *you're* in it. 🌟
No pressure, no rush, no expectations. Just a small note to say: *hello, I'm thinking of you, and I hope your day has at least one moment that makes you smile.* 🌸
I Hope you smile when you read this letter :)
content.name: - Sunflower 🌻

envelope.title: Somewhere Between Us
envelope.subtitle: Not just friends… not quite lovers… but something that feels right

content.title: A Little Confession Wrapped in Smiles ✨
paragraphs: I don’t really know what to call *us* yet… but I know that whatever this is, it makes my days softer and my nights a little brighter 🌙✨
It’s funny how we started so casually, just talking, laughing, sharing random little things… and now somehow, you’ve become someone I look forward to every single day 💬💞
There’s this comfort in you… like I don’t have to pretend, don’t have to try too hard. I can just be me and somehow, that feels enough when I’m with you 🤍
Maybe we’re not labeling it yet, maybe we’re just floating somewhere in between… but I won’t lie I really, really like being here with you 🫶
And if this “in-between” slowly turns into something more someday… I think I’d like that a lot 🌸
content.signOff: Always a little more yours than I admit 🌼
content.name: Sunflower 🌻
